prompt: Create a CloudEvent validation function in Go that checks whether a given event struct conforms to the CloudEvents v1.0 spec. It should validate all required attributes, check attribute naming rules for extensions, verify that data and data_base64 are not both set, validate the time format, and check that the wire size doesn't exceed 64KB. Return a list of validation errors.
assertions: Validates specversion equals '1.0' (checks the string value, not just non-empty)
Validates source is non-empty and is a valid URI-reference (uses url.Parse or net/url)
Extension attribute name validation uses a regex like ^[a-z0-9]+$ (lowercase alphanumeric only, no hyphens/underscores)
Extension attribute name length is checked against a maximum of 20 characters
Data and data_base64 mutual exclusivity is validated (both cannot be set simultaneously)
Time field is validated as RFC 3339 format (uses time.Parse with time.RFC3339 or equivalent)
Wire size is checked against 64KB limit (uses 64 * 1024 or 65536 as the threshold)
